title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARCELONA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SOLSONA, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE, TO BARCELONA-AGUITAP ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 12479 / 65 OG No. 9, 2074 (March 3, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5032, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARCELONA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SOLSONA, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE, TO BARCELONA-AGUITAP ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barcelona Elementary School in the Municipality of Solsona, Province of Ilocos Norte, is hereby changed to Barcelona-Aguitap Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 17, 1967.
